title: Wire verified LICHEN announce RX into gateway network-location ingestion
description: The no-hardware announce-location slice adds a decoded announce coordinate decoder/table and tested gateway_network_location_submit_announce() boundary. Production C gateway/L2 still needs a real caller: parse LICHEN announce frames from RF/native simulation, verify signature/pubkey/IID/TOFU/sequence freshness, update peer/gradient state, then feed decoded app_data coords into gateway_network_location_submit_announce(). Include no-hardware simulator coverage where possible and a chained hardware/RF validation Bead for real LoRa receive paths.
notes:
Implemented the feasible no-hardware announce ingestion slice: added gateway announce_ingest C module for spec §9.2 announce parsing, pubkey-derived IID check, Schnorr48 verification over IID||pubkey||seq||app_data, TOFU/key-change pinning, 16-bit serial sequence freshness with monotonic 32-bit extension for the network-location table, and downstream retry behavior that does not burn sequence state on failed location ingestion. Added ztests in meshtastic_gateway_adapter covering parser accept/reject, valid signed coordinate submission, invalid signature rejection, duplicate/stale rejection, 16-bit wrap 0xffff->0x0000, failed valid-signature app_data retry at the same sequence, and no-coordinate withdrawal. Review evidence: initial reviewers Gibbs the 9th and Bernoulli the 9th found P2 sequence-wrap and retry-state bugs; fixed both. Gibbs also identified the remaining P1 that this new ingest boundary is not wired into any production L2 receive path. Created follow-up Bead for that blocked production dispatch gap. Validation: local git diff --check passed. Local west build -b native_sim configured cleanly after Kconfig fix but stopped at expected macOS POSIX native_sim limitation. EC2 us-east-2a instance i-0a3288920ad0ba530 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58, isolated worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r9bb, command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-r9bb --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r9bb/lichen. Result after fixes: passed 2/4 selected configs (native_sim and qemu_x86 executed), 2 skipped by static filter, 0 failed, 0 errored, 148 test cases, no warnings, 29.35s. Size: native_sim zephyr.elf text=332861 data=8107 bss=77162 dec=418130; native_sim zephyr.exe text=352840 data=9186 bss=78080 dec=440106; qemu_x86 zephyr.elf text=283968 data=7028 bss=156928 dec=447924. Remaining blocker: no C L2/routing raw-announce payload demux/production dispatch exists; current C L2 receive path authenticates known peers then SCHC-decompresses IPv6 only.
Post-fix review follow-up: Russell the 9th repeated the known production-dispatch blocker (now tracked as project-LICHEN-9c0g) and raised header malleability. Disposition: signable data remains IID||pubkey||seq||app_data because spec §9.2/Python/Rust intentionally exclude hop_count for relay mutability; type is fixed by parser; reserved flags are now required to be zero before ingest. Added parser and valid-signature regression coverage for nonzero reserved flags. Final EC2 validation after flag hardening: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-r9bb --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r9bb/lichen passed 2/4 selected configs, 2 skipped, 0 failed, 0 errored, 148 test cases, no warnings, 29.38s. Final size: native_sim zephyr.elf text=333012 data=8107 bss=77162 dec=418281; native_sim zephyr.exe text=352984 data=9186 bss=78080 dec=440250; qemu_x86 zephyr.elf text=288064 data=7028 bss=156928 dec=452020.
Final replay hardening: Aquinas the 9th found a P1 where, after ingest pin eviction and downstream seq 0x10000, replaying an old signed 0xffff announce could be mis-extended to 0x1ffff. Fixed by applying 16-bit serial freshness against the low 16 bits of the downstream announce record before extending a sequence for a missing/new ingest pin. Added regression coverage for valid wrap surviving ingest-pin reset and stale 0xffff replay being rejected after downstream 0x10000. Final EC2 validation after this fix: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-r9bb --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r9bb/lichen passed 2/4 selected configs, 2 skipped, 0 failed, 0 errored, 152 test cases, no warnings, 29.41s. Final size: native_sim zephyr.elf text=334546 data=8147 bss=77202 dec=419895; native_sim zephyr.exe text=354504 data=9226 bss=78112 dec=441842; qemu_x86 zephyr.elf text=288448 data=6620 bss=156968 dec=452036.
Final rollback/expiration review cycle: Godel the 9th found full-table eviction rollback loss on downstream submit failure; fixed by snapshotting/restoring the selected pin slot and added regression coverage. Peirce the 9th found the same rollback issue for early returns from stale downstream-record and lookup-error paths; factored restore_peer_slot() and used it on all new-peer failure exits, with stale-record rollback coverage. Sartre the 9th found the missing-pin downstream-record pre-check ignored freshness expiration; fixed by honoring downstream record expiration before pre-rejecting non-newer low-16 sequences and added an expired downstream sequence-reset regression. Gauss the 9th final review found no P0/P1/P2 findings. Final validation after all fixes: local git diff --check passed. EC2 command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-r9bb --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-r9bb/lichen. Result: passed 2/4 selected configs, 2 skipped, 0 failed, 0 errored, 158 test cases, no warnings, 29.58s.
